data.content: Updated active-view regressions for Knots, direct Beads, bd CLI, and the auto-routed .beads backend so active children keep their queued ancestors visible while shipped siblings remain hidden. Validation: bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build; bun run lint (warnings only). Branch: feat/foolery-e805-active-ancestor. Commit: 84e47100afc2.
